/TWS/CH2 ISS CPROB PROB 18M PJ6D/CTS 6/VF2 150/X HARVEY WAIVER TAKEN/X STAY OUT OF ORDER IF ANY IN COURT NO, 2481692 IS TRANSFERRED TO  THIS CASE COURT NO,15002127/X:STAY OUT OF CVS AT 701 PORTOLA DRIVE, SF AND GROCERY OUTLET AT 2630 BAY SHORE BLVD, SF/SAORD/DEF:SERVED COPIES OF THE STAY OUT OFORDER/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/BKFEE/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/REMA/

/CAL:SPR ELIG REPORT/GTWM/VD:TRIAL ON 02-13-15 AND LAST DAY OF 02-27-15/DEF:IS RELEASED TO SPR/DEF:REPORT DAILY IN-PERSON FOR 2 WEEKS, THEN TBD AFTERWARD;   PARTICIPATE IN SUBSTANCE ABUSE TREATMENT/CONTD:PRETRIAL/DOP/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/BAIL:10,000/NTW/LDTR:03-02-15/X:COURT REFERS DEFENDANT TO SPR FOR AN ELIGIBILITY REPORT, RETURNABLE TO DEPARTMENT 17 ON 02-02-15,/X:ADA RESERVESTHE RIGHT TO FILE A STAY-AWAY ORDER,/CONTD:SPR ELIGIBILITY AND JURY TRIAL/DOP/

/CAL DISPO/TEXT TRANS TO DEPT 28/TRANS 28 FORTHWITH FOR DISPOSITION/
